stories.title: Kendall Wells HR No. 27 — Sets SEC Single-Season Freshman Record

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells: 27 home runs.

She just broke the SEC single-season freshman HR record.

Opposite field. 6th inning. Runners on. Wichita State had no answer.

The NCAA freshman record is 30. She needs 3 more.

We are watching history. 🥎

#BoomerSooner #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
SEC freshman HR record: broken.

Wells is at 27 in 37 games.

Jocelyn Alo set the NCAA record at 30. Lauren Chamberlain hit 30. Kelly Majam hit 30.

Wells is 3 away from joining that list.

And she's a freshman.

#BoomerSooner #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Kendall Wells Sets SEC Freshman HR Record With Her 27th Home Run of 2026

stories.title: No. 1 Texas at No. 4 Alabama — Series Preview (Starts Tomorrow)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
No. 1 Texas. No. 4 Alabama. Rhoads Stadium.

Game 1: Thu, April 2 — 6 PM CT (SEC Network+)
Game 2: Fri, April 3 — 7:30 PM CT (SEC Network)
Game 3: Sat, April 4 — 5 PM CT (ESPN)

The biggest SEC series of 2026 starts tomorrow. 🥎

#HookEm #RollTide #NCAASoftball #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Texas vs. Alabama.

All-time series: Alabama leads 7-2.

First time they're meeting as SEC conference rivals.

Alabama beat defending champion Oklahoma at Rhoads last year.

No. 1 comes to Tuscaloosa. This is it. 🥎

#RollTide #HookEm #NCAASoftball

stories.title: NFCA Week 8 Results — Texas Holds No. 1, FSU Climbs to No. 6

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
NFCA Week 8 final:

No. 1 Texas (31-2) — held it.
No. 2 Texas Tech (34-2) — 9 pts back.
No. 3 Oklahoma
No. 5 Florida — dropped 2 spots.
No. 6 FSU — 21-game streak rewarded.

Texas Tech is 9 points from No. 1. 🥎

#NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: Oklahoma Hosts Kentucky This Weekend — Sooners Eye SEC Lead

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Wells broke the SEC record Tuesday.

Now the Sooners come home to face Kentucky starting Thursday at 6:30 PM at Love's Field.

OU is 35-3. 8-1 in SEC play.

Can she hit No. 28 this weekend? 👀

#BoomerSooner #NCAASoftball #SECSoftball

stories.title: Florida at Stetson Tonight — Gators' First Test After Arkansas Loss

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
No. 5 Florida (33-4) is in DeLand tonight at 6 PM ET vs. Stetson.

After losing two in Fayetteville to Arkansas and dropping two spots in the poll — the Gators need a reset game.

This is that game.

#Gators #NCAASoftball

stories.title: Florida State Climbs to No. 6 — 21-Game Streak Still Rolling

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Florida State: 21-game win streak. 9-0 in the ACC. 32-4 overall.

They just climbed to No. 6 in the NFCA poll.

Isa Torres is hitting .655.

Lonni Alameda has 1,000 career wins.

Why aren't we talking about FSU as a No. 1 contender? 🥎

#NoleFamily #NCAASoftball

stories.title: Weekend Preview — Two Marquee SEC Series to Watch

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
This weekend in softball:

📍 No. 1 Texas at No. 4 Alabama (Thu-Sat, ESPN Sat)
📍 No. 3 Oklahoma vs. Kentucky (Thu-Sat, Love's Field)

Two SEC series. Six games. Every one matters.

Your softball weekend starts tomorrow. 🥎

#NCAASoftball #SECSoftball #CollegeSoftball
